message:
feat(core): add signals_from_queue_depths for runtime maintenance integration

Add FleetScrollbackCoordinator::signals_from_queue_depths() that maps
raw capture/write queue depth metrics (already available in the runtime
health snapshot) to PressureSignals for the fleet memory controller.

Threshold alignment: Green <50%, Yellow 50-80%, Red 80-95%, Black >=95%
matching the existing classify_backpressure_tier logic in runtime.rs.

This enables the maintenance loop to call the coordinator with values
it already computes, without introducing new dependencies.

6 new tests: all tier boundaries + worst-of-queues + zero-capacity edge.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
